task_completion.description: Navigate to the user management section in Eramba
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface is visible, showing a navigation menu or page header indicating 'Users', 'User Management', 'Access Control', or similar.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new user
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Add User', 'Create User', 'New User', or similar is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Enter the user's full name and username
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text input fields for the user's name contain 'Alexandra' and 'Chen', and the username/login field contains 'achen'.
The text input field for the email address contains exactly 'alexandra.chen@company.com'.

task_completion.description: Assign the user to the 'Security Analyst' group or role
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, multi-select box, or checkbox list for groups/roles shows 'Security Analyst' as selected or checked.

task_completion.description: Save the user and verify creation
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'User created successfully') is displayed, or the newly created user 'achen' ('Alexandra Chen') is visible as an entry in the main user list table.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eramba web interface rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Interactions occur within a web browser showing the Eramba graphical user interface, not via MySQL queries in a terminal window.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Eramba application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid local or remote URL for the Eramba instance, not a local file path (file://) to a mock HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) are not open and being used to inject HTML into the user list.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected username is exactly 'achen'. The expected email is exactly 'alexandra.chen@company.com'. The user's full name is Alexandra Chen. The assigned group or role must be 'Security Analyst'. Eramba is a web-based GRC platform, so all valid interactions should take place within a web browser.
